regional_summary_6h.headline: MENA threat index 2.06 (STABLE, steady) driven by Iran

bullets.text: Iran's military conflicts with the US and its allies are escalating tensions in the region
Iran's proxy wars in countries like Lebanon and Palestine are contributing to the instability
Diplomatic tensions between Iran and other countries, such as the UAE, are being strained by the ongoing conflicts

markets.headline: Market data unavailable this run.
markets.method_note: Threat beta = OLS of daily log-returns on the index change at the lead lag; launch-day estimates lean on BNTI-seeded history. Association, not causation.
